title: PlanReviewCoachInputsOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_coach_inputs`: the prompt-template `plan` text and the Pass-4 coach `instructions` (move registry + surviving-findings listing) fed into the workflow's coach_notes prompt step (its `with: {plan, instructions}`).

plan.description: The assembled plan text (PlanContext.plan_text) — resolves the coach prompt's {{plan}}.

instructions.description: The Pass-4 coach instructions: the same move-registry + surviving-findings listing the bespoke pass4_coach builds.
